name: webster-sec-filing
description: Chat app for asking questions about the Webster SEC filing

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.start: npm run install:all && concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --prefix server start" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --prefix server start" "npm --prefix client run dev"
